creator: bsdcode@disroot.org
text:
Thanks! Using find arguments in COPYTREE_SHARE and also -regex to only rm the top-level README.md is definitely better than my approach.

I have only one minor nit-pick: DATADIR belongs to the "standard bsd.port.mk variables" block (section 15.9 of porters handbook) and should therefore be separated from the previous "USES and USE_x" block (section 15.8) by a newline. I would keep the newline in place.

That aside, feel free to commit the suggestions.
